cmd:
sed -i 's/const value = await client.get(COUNTER_KEY);/return await client.incr(COUNTER_KEY);/' /app/app/counter.js
sed -i '/const current = await client.get(COUNTER_KEY);/d' /app/app/counter.js
sed -i '/const value = parseInt(current || "0", 10);/d' /app/app/counter.js
sed -i '/const newValue = value + 1;/d' /app/app/counter.js
sed -i '/await client.set(COUNTER_KEY, newValue.toString());/d' /app/app/counter.js
sed -i 's/logger.debug(`Counter incremented: ${value} -> ${newValue}`);/logger.debug(
